livestock_water_consumption.description: Average daily water consumption per animal type used in livestock and agricultural operations. Values are measured in cubic meters per day (m3/day).

data.name: beef
data.description: Beef cattle used for milk, meat production

data.name: dairy_dry
data.description: Cows in the field or open natural environment

data.name: dairy_including_wash_water
data.description: Dairy cows including wash water used in dairy operations, under closed facility

data.name: goats
data.description: Goats used for milk or meat

data.name: horse
data.description: Horses used for industrial or business purpose

data.name: llama_alpaca
data.description: Llamas or alpacas used for fiber or livestock

data.name: poultry_laying
data.description: Laying hens used for egg production

data.name: sheep
data.description: Sheep used for wool, milk, or meat
